EmailTemplate.name: AN - Sydney - Welcome email candidate
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to Alliance Nursing - Sydney
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
WELCOME TO ALLIANCE NURSING.
{!Contact.FirstName}, welcome to Alliance Nursing.
Your day-to-day with Alliance is best managed via the Alliance Connect app. This is where you can:
Update your availability and accept shifts Submit timesheets View payslips
And as always, if you have any questions or concerns you can always call our friendly staff on 1300 034 494.
We are thrilled to have you onboard!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
